title: Absolute Realism
description: Transforms Minecraft into a realistic game, with vast and beautiful world, cinematic graphics, lots of new content, and completely overhauled gameplay.
body:
#

Absolute Realism **

Transforms Minecraft into a realistic game, with vast and beautiful world,
cinematic graphics, lots of new content, and completely overhauled gameplay.** **** ![Great view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6847e47ce404b2b809207ad0b7390775538d8272.png) ![Rolling Hills](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d81a04dd88d8e7de59e5b4b250c31d4fec6665f6.png) **

More screenshots from the modpack in gallery!** **** ##

Important! 1. _**Allocate 4-8 gigabytes of RAM for Absolute Realism. To do that, in your modpacks list in modrinth launcher click on Absolute Realism, then click the gear icon on the top right, go to Java and memory and drag the slider to 4096-8192.**_ 2. _**Turn off VSync for better performance in Options -> Video Settings -> General.**_ 3. **_By default LOD Dropoff Distance is set to extreme, which noticebly impacts performance but gives the best graphics possible. This can also cause severe lags in specific conditions on weaker hardware. You can fix that by setting LOD Dropoff Distance to High in Options -> Distant Horizons (the cube on the top left in options) -> Advanced options -> Graphics -> Quality._** 4. **If you want to play with guns you have to turn on FAR_BLUR_ONLY in Video Settings -> Shader Packs -> Shader Pack Settings -> Post Processing -> Depth Of Field settings.** 5. **If you experience a visual bug "melting GPU" fix that by re-enabling Rendering in Distant Horizons options.** 6. To see info about new items - use REI mod, the search bar to the right of your inventory. You can use @ to see items from a specific mod. 7. If you want to generate chunks faster (real chunks, not DH) consider increasing Chunk Update Threads in Options -> Video Settings -> Performance

Useful keybinds 1. Left Alt - change walk speed 2. C - crawl 3. X - sit anywhere 4. ' - toggle suit flight (ad astra armor set) 5. , - fire select (Timeless & Classic zero guns)
**** Original source of bliss shader - https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader
